title: Captain Green and the Eco-Teens
description: Captain Green and the Eco Teens! Picking up trash and recycling things! Doing our chores, hugging a tree, solving problems non-violently!
quote: Let’s save the rainforest with an eco rap!
altHero: Captain Green, a superhero with a bright green mohawk, putting a soda can in a recycle bin
alt1: gloved hand picking up a soda can from the ground
alt2: Captain Green giving a thumbs up to three friends: a native man in traditional garb, a red-haired boy with a broken foot, and an Asian woman holding a football
alt4: Captain Green shaking hands with another buff guy with an X on his chest
